name: Korean Hangul
description: Korean Hangul alphabet — readings and meanings

facts.quizQuestion: What sound does the Hangul ㄱ represent?
facts.explanation: ㄱ (g/k) — a basic consonant in the Korean Hangul writing system.

facts.quizQuestion: Which Hangul basic consonant represents 'g/k'?
facts.explanation: In Korean Hangul, the sound 'g/k' is represented by the basic consonant ㄱ.
